allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); checks=data.get\(''''statusCheckRollup'''',[]\); [print\(f""{c[''''state'''']:12} {c.get\(''''name'''',''''?''''\)}""\) for c in checks]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); checks=data.get\(''''statusCheckRollup'''',[]\); [print\(json.dumps\(c, indent=2\)\) for c in checks[:5]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''State:'''', d[''''state'''']\); print\(''''Head:'''', d[''''headRefOid'''']\); commits=d.get\(''''commits'''',{}\).get\(''''nodes'''',[]\); [print\(c[''''commit''''][''''oid''''][:7], c[''''commit''''][''''message''''][:60]\) for c in commits[-5:]]")
